text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Believing that a victory at the Takarazuka Kinen
will motivate her hospitalized father in his
recovery, Tamamo Cross is determined to win.
But another competitor stands between her and
first place...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The racer in question is Inari One, an Edo girl
from Oi. Although they ran in different races, she
was a regional runner like Oguri Cap. Now, a
showdown between Kanto and Kansai
competitors is about to kick off.
